content:
🚀 tiptop | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Monitoring system resource usage and performance from the command line.
✨ Key Features: • Command-line system monitoring • Real-time system statistics • Graphs system data • Cross-platform compatibility • Textual-based interface
📖 Summary: Tiptop is a command-line system monitoring tool written in Python, inspired by 'top'. It provides real-time system statistics and visualizes them using graphs, working across all operating systems. It leverages Textual for its interface and psutil for data retrieval.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
